title: VHSCraft
description: Minecraft, but it's a bodycam in 4:3
body:
# VHSCraft
## Minecraft, but it's bodycam in 4:3
This modpack turns the game into a creepy bodycam experience, not quite a full-fledged horror experience, but still scary.

<details>
<summary>Features</summary>

## [Camcord](https://modrinth.com/mod/camcord) (By LudoCrypt)
It is this mod that gives the effect of a bodycam with an admixture of VHS, although it looks like you have -5 vision, but still.
![Camcord example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqKBdlDJ/images/c5ce44cb1f734b4e5cc5711f4ac0cf4314e037a0.png)
## [Real Camera](https://modrinth.com/mod/real-camera) (By XTracr)
And this is a mod for a first-person view, and a real first-person one: the camera is attached to the character’s head, allowing you to see emotions and rolls (more on them later) as intended.
![RC example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqKBdlDJ/images/749d40c3ebfc4efad10dbe5bf1dc017d523c8409.png)
## [Combat Roll](https://modrinth.com/mod/combat-roll) and [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) (By ZsoltMolnarrr)
The first one adds a combat roll, and the second one adds a cool combat system that looks great with Real Camera
(I don't have an image :( )
## [Emotecraft](https://modrinth.com/mod/emotecraft) (By KosmX)
Adds emotions to the game. The modpack already has preset emotions, and the look of the item in the hand is bind to the ''Alt'' key
![EC example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqKBdlDJ/images/bc9f918196899fb000eddde96b73a7011534857f.png)
## [From The Fog](https://modrinth.com/datapack/from-the-fog) (By LunarEclipseStudios)
Adds... him
![FTF example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqKBdlDJ/images/59987c714576de060320a45332e85a3a11a01cec.png)
## [Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/reimagined) (By Reijvi)
A resource pack with a wonderful atmosphere and also slightly modified for the modpack, it is highly recommended to play with it (Also, you can download the resource pack patch from this [link](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/reimagined-fixes/files/4691564) to fix Sodium bugs)
![Reimagined example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/SqKBdlDJ/images/309062fc8500aacc30035aa2143a757a4bec3dee.png)
## And many others
Like [Map Atlases](https://modrinth.com/mod/map-atlases), [Additional Additions](https://modrinth.com/mod/addadd), [Supplementaries](https://modrinth.com/mod/supplementaries), [built-in shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/makeup-ultra-fast-shaders) and more
</details>

**Modpack is built on [Additive](https://modrinth.com/modpack/additive) (By devin) and is well optimized**  
I also advise you to set up the controls yourself when you first start, and also look at the full list of mods (in the “Versions” section, click on the desired [version](https://modrinth.com/modpack/vhscraft/version/aVWdetL9))
